YouTube Downloader.changelog:
• Updated to latest Jetpack Compose for smoother UI and better performance.
• Switched to Media3 for improved playback stability.
• New navigation system for faster screen transitions.
• Optimized image loading and reduced memory usage.
• Improved download reliability for high quality videos.
• Fixed navigation lag and random freezes.
• General bug fixes and performance improvements.

DasMediaHub.changelog:

• Improved video player performance and stability.
• Better image loading and scrolling.
• Fixed issues with playback and navigation.
• General bug fixes and improvements.
